items.claim: Conor McGregor has not fought in five years.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a catastrophic leg injury.
items.quote: he's coming off of that catastrophic leg injury that he suffered in the trilogy against Dustin Porier.

items.claim: Benoit Saint Denis is on a four-fight win streak.
items.quote: Ben Wis riding a fouright win streak coming into this matchup.

items.claim: Cody Durden's performance fades after the first round.
items.quote: it just feels like against these younger, very dangerous opponents, it all just kind of starts to fade after the very first round.

items.claim: Alejandro Costa possesses dangerous power in his boxing.
items.quote: He's got super dangerous power, right? Not only does he throw big powerful shots with the boxing

items.claim: Alejandro Costa is highly skilled at attacking the body.
items.quote: he rips the body just about as good as anybody in the UFC right now.
